violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket found with 0ppm chlorine and cloudy.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Dirty utensils in hand sink basin upon arrival. *COS removed from basin.
